mapper.select: SELECT id, name, sex, tel, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,birthday,NOW()) AS age, appointment_date, status FROM tb_appointment WHERE order_id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT a.uuid, o.snapshot_id AS snapshotId FROM tb_appointment a INNER JOIN tb_order o ON a.order_id = o.id WHERE a.appointment_date = #{currentDate} AND a.pid = #{pid}

SELECT a.uuid, a.order_id, o.snapshot_id, a.name, a.sex, a.birthday, a.pid, a.tel, a.appointment_date, a.appointment_desc as `desc` FROM tb_appointment a INNER JOIN tb_order o ON a.order_id = o.id WHERE a.id = #{appointmentId}

SELECT a.`name`, a.sex, a.birthday, a.tel, a.uuid, a.pid, a.appointment_date, a.checkin_time, a.`status`, o.snapshot_id AS snapshotId FROM tb_appointment a INNER JOIN tb_order o ON a.order_id = o.id WHERE a.uuid = #{uuid}
